thesis: MORNING window (11:00-ET focus, generated 2026-07-21T14:48:22Z / ~10:48 ET Tuesday 7/21) — what changes TODAY's plan on the LIVE, market-open intraday tape. STRUCTURE FIRST: the extended tech-led structural bull is DIGESTING near all-time highs and, versus this morning's earlier pre-market reads, the tape has FIRMED intraday — but the leadership breadth is still NOT repaired. The one thing that materially moved: SPY 747.21 has RECLAIMED its 50-day (now +0.46% ABOVE ~743.8, up from -0.18% under it at 11:18), pushing back to -1.37% off the ATH (~757.6), while VIX eased further to 17.38 (band 17.4). This is a fresh LIVE Tuesday intraday read — values have MOVED off Monday's carried 742.09, so the frame is no longer a carried Monday snapshot. Persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars is 7 (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17); 7/17 is the last bar Tier-A can confirm — Monday 7/20 completed as a session but no distinct settled 7/20 close is carried (Monday's intraday 742.09 is now superseded by Tuesday's live 747.21), and today's 7/21 is live intraday, neither counted. WHAT THE FRAME SAYS: SPY reclaimed its 50-day (constructive) but QQQ 707.19 is STILL tangled and -1.61% BELOW its own 50-day (~718.8, mom5 -1.74) — the reclaim it never won stays UNWON even after recovering from -3.13%; SPMO 148.54 bull-stacked / VGT 115.43 tangled, both still soft short-term (mom5 -2.82 / -1.43). MSFT 400.74 now sits EXACTLY ON its 50-day (+0.01%, ~400.7, mom5 +4.11) — pressing harder but still bear-stacked and -8.24% below its 200-day (~436.7), no confirmed close. ROTATION: XLE stays Leading (rsRatio 100.32>100, accel +1.17, rsMom 102.07 board-best, rotation into, +12.95% over its 200-day), oil/broad-commodities confirm underneath (real-assets 13:30Z: PDBC 67.6 / DBC 67.4 / BNO 66.2 Uptrend); XLK is the sector model's fresh 'into' pick (Basing up, accel +1.25, rotation into) while XLF (accel -1.48), XLV (accel -3.53, worst) and XLI Weakening/out and the prior defensive bid (XLRE now accel -0.08 neutral, XLP rolled to Lagging) fades. Semis firmed on RS (SOXX rsMom back to 100.13, Improving up, rotation into) but internals stay thin (only 2/12 above their 50-day, 0/12 up-momentum, rsMom1m -14.36). TACTICAL, last: monthly OPEX (7/17) is RESOLVED and dealer gamma has RESET — prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed. PLAN for today: HOLD the bull-stack and do NOT chase index beta up ~5 points into ATH resistance while QQQ is still tangled below its 50-day (SPY's reclaim needs QQQ to confirm the broadening); ROTATE toward the confirmed Leading XLE and the basing XLK over weakening XLV/XLF; TRIM stretched, internally-thin semis into intraday strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT as it presses its 50-day into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail — the even-lower VIX makes it cheaper to carry, not less necessary — after re-verifying the live path.
